parties.name: SERRANO, EDWARD J., AKA EDWARD J.A. FARGUE 2918-26TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Edward J. Serrano, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony, the request for a Decree Changing Name is Denied without prejudice.
Petitioner to file the petition in the proper county (San Mateo).
